LAHARL-LAHARL.title: Overlord Laharl
LAHARL-LAHARL.description: Arrogant and absurdly powerful Overlord of the Netherworld.
LAHARL-LAHARL.cardsModifierDescription: Laharl cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
LAHARL-LAHARL.eventDeathPrevention: Hmph. So this is defeat…? Ridiculous.
LAHARL-LAHARL.goldMonologue: Of course I deserve this. I am the Overlord, after all.
LAHARL-LAHARL.banter.dead.endTurnPing: Tch… don’t misunderstand. This isn’t over.
LAHARL-LAHARL.banter.alive.endTurnPing: Hurry up. An Overlord does not wait.
